element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Foundation for all combat; expanded from previous game
Scattered along levels; collected during combat flow
Unique per character (Axel, Blaze, Max, Skate); introduces timing/direction mechanics
Progressive difficulty; multiple enemies attacking simultaneously
Risk/reward mechanic; trades player health for area clearing power
Culmination of level skills; pattern recognition required
Each has unique speed/power tradeoffs: Axel (balanced), Blaze (speed), Max (power/slow), Skate (speed/weak)

typical_tension_triggers: Special Attack used (health sacrifice for power)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Wave-based combat rhythm: enemies approach in groups, players manage resources (health via Special Attacks), tension peaks at boss encounters, relief through weapon/item collection and enemy defeat

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of basic combat mechanics and enemy types; single-enemy groups with weapon availability
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy density, introduction of Special Attack mechanic, multi-stage boss patterns
difficulty_curve.late_game: Island setting; convergence toward Mr. X's hideout; climactic confrontation with Mr. X and bodyguard Shiva
notable_spikes: Final island segment requiring sustained combat against coordinated enemies

notable_level_patterns.description: Campaign travels from Wood Oak City streets through progressively more dangerous urban/industrial areas
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Early levels set in city streets with regular criminal activity

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level culminates in boss fight that tests mastery of stage mechanics
Journey culminates on desolate island containing Mr. X's hideout; final confrontation against Mr. X and Shiva
Rescue mission structure: kidnapped Adam provides motivation; collecting 4-character team (Axel, Blaze, Skate, Max) as progression incentive
